## The problem / motivation
<!-- What are you trying to do that dev-forge makes hard today? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What would you like it to do? A new command, flag, output, taxonomy category…? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other ways you've thought about solving this. -->

## Does it fit dev-forge's focus?
<!-- dev-forge is a *local-first, root-cause knowledge base* — capture → remember → never-repeat,
     with reports/résumés as byproducts. How does this idea serve that, rather than turning it
     into a general accomplishment/brag-doc tool? -->

## Anything else
<!-- Mockups of the output, example records, links to prior art. -->
